---
title: Searching and Sorting
---

## Contents

1. [Intro to Searching](01 Intro to Searching.qmd)

2. [Sequential Search](02 Sequential Search.qmd)

3. [Binary Search](03 Binary Search.qmd)

4. [Intro to Sorting](04 Intro to Sorting.qmd)

5. [Bubble Sort](05 Bubble Sort.qmd)

6. [Selection Sort](06 Selection Sort.qmd)

7. [Insertion Sort](07 Insertion Sort.qmd)

8. [Comparing Sorts](08 Comparing Sorts.qmd)
